channel.title: Manusha's Daily Drive
channel.description: A personalized daily briefing on AI, anime, and your favorite creators.

item.title: Jun 19, 2026 — OpenAI Prepares GPT-5.6 Release With Pro Variant Testing
item.description: [AI] OpenAI Prepares GPT-5.6 Release With Pro Variant Testing — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBqQzd4T0pIYlJmU09IQVBXczQ5VEFETTFtTWs3SFNoVzNCazl5TlZqbF9TVHdULUlzOHRCTlJNOGRiU2t0OFJuU2tTd1dJUWxZeWt4NURFd2NQdnNUdjZVTkVJVEo?oc=5 [AI] China's Z.AI Launches GLM-5.2, an Open Model Rivaling Claude Opus — Without Nvidia Chips — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] Trump Administration Clashes With Anthropic Over AI Model Exports and Release Controls — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5 [AI] Google Gemini Co-Lead Noam Shazeer Leaves for OpenAI — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] OpenAI Releases LifeSciBench: A 750-Task Benchmark for AI in Life-Science Research — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5 [AI] Alibaba Releases Qwen for Robotics With Navigation, Manipulation, and World Modeling Suite — item.title: Jun 18, 2026 — Anthropic Launches Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, Splitting the AI Frontier
item.description: [AI] Anthropic Launches Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, Splitting the AI Frontier — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] Z.ai Releases GLM-5.2 With 1M-Token Context, Beats GPT-5.5 on Coding item.title: Jun 17, 2026 — US Government Orders Shutdown of Anthropic's Flagship Claude Mythos 5 Model

item.title: Jun 16, 2026 — Anthropic Pulls Claude Fable and Mythos AI Models After US Government Claims Jailbreak Risk

Game the System Anime Releases New Trailer With Opening and Ending Songs — https://news.google.?oc=5 [YouTube/Fireship] One man just liberated Fable... and now it’s illegal — https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ey_GaPdC9zk
